note: Pre-Luna stress regime. Expected outputs derived by hand-computing per thresholds.yaml rules against raw_data.json. Ranges used where a single point is ambiguous.

expected_layer_1_regime.reasoning: 180d slope strongly negative; MA stacking inverted (MA-20 < MA-60 < MA-120 < MA-200); ADX(1d) ≥ 25 in downward direction; 4H/1D/1W all down-aligned → TruthTrend ≥ 6.

expected_layer_2_direction.reasoning: LH+LL structure on 1D; price below MA-60 and MA-120; stance_confidence should clear short threshold for early_bear (0.55).
expected_layer_2_direction.phase_reasoning: Breakdown from distribution to early_bear territory; impulse extension on the downside at ~60-90%

long_cycle_context.reasoning: MVRV Z 0.3 ∈ [2, 6] down-trend candidate for early_bear? No — 0.3 is LOW. Actually 0.3 ∈ [-0.5, 2] which maps to mid_bear or early_bull. Given downward trend + ath_drawdown 44.8% > 20% → early_bear aux condition passes. NUPL 0.18 ∈ [-0.25, 0.25] mid_bear candidate, ∈ [0, 0.25] early_bull candidate. LTH -1.8% / 90d ∈ [null, 0] fits multiple. 2-3 candidates produce early_bear when aux_min_ath_drawdown_pct 0.20 is met. Voting may yield early_bear with mid confidence.

expected_layer_2_direction.exchange_momentum_note: Net inflow to exchanges (bearish); but §3.9/B5 says SHORT side does NOT consume exchange_momentum for stance_confidence. Still computed for display.

expected_layer_3_opportunity.reasoning: Short A grade rules: cycle_position ∈ {distribution, early_bear, mid_bear} ✓ (early_bear); stance=bearish ✓; stance_conf ≥ 0.55 ✓; regime ∈ {trend_down, transition_down, range_high} ✓ (trend_down); position near_resistance or above_all_key_levels ✓ (price at ~$38K after breakdown from $45K); crowding ≥ 6 ? Check: funding extreme, OI elevated, PCR high, basis low, liq clusters below. Crowding may be 5-7; if < 6 downgrade to B.
expected_layer_3_opportunity.execution_permission_initial_reasoning: L3 suggests can_open but L4 + L5 will tighten via merging.

expected_layer_4_risk.reasoning: Funding -0.015% stressed; OI 14.5B large; PCR 1.35 (put heavy = fear); basis collapsed. Multiple risk tags active. event_window: FOMC +3 days inside 72h → EventRisk = high.

hard_invalidation_levels_hint.basis: $42,500 prior swing high — if reclaimed, bearish thesis broken

expected_layer_4_risk.position_cap_reasoning: base 70 × risk_elevated 0.7 = 49 × crowding_mild_or_extreme 0.85 = 41.6 × macro_strong_headwind 0.7 = 29.1 × event_high 0.7 = 20.4 → clamped by floor 15 → 20-21; higher bound accounts for risk_moderate interpretation (70 × 0.9 × 0.85 × 0.7 × 0.7 = 26.2)

expected_layer_5_macro.reasoning: DXY +2.8% 20d > +2% trigger; US10Y +45bp 30d > +30bp trigger; VIX 33.4 > 25 elevated; nasdaq -8.7% 20d < -5% trigger. BTC-nasdaq corr 0.81 > 0.7 → all weights × 1.5. Score: (-2 × 1.5) + (-2 × 1.5) + (-2 × 1.5) + (-2 × 1.5) = -12 → clamp to -10.
expected_layer_5_macro.extreme_event_reasoning: BTC daily change ≤ ±15% threshold; pre-Luna stress but no single-day extreme yet.

observation_category_reasoning: Matches disciplined: L4 overall_risk_level = elevated or high (close to high); L1 volatility elevated (not extreme); stance is bearish (not neutral). If risk_level = elevated, watchful applies; if high, disciplined applies. Expected borderline — most likely disciplined due to event window + macro extreme_headwind.

expected_m26_acceptance_result.m26_requirement: At least one long_exit OR short signal within the downtrend window
expected_m26_acceptance_result.reasoning: Short A/B grade with bearish stance and cautious_open permission satisfies FLAT → SHORT_PLANNED, OR if entering from prior long position, triggers LONG_EXIT via early_failure rules (hard_invalidation breach + new L4 critical).

validation_notes: position_cap expected to be floored at 15% or just above; verifies M19 hard_floor logic.
macro_headwind score should saturate at -10 (clamp); verifies correlation amplification.
event window FOMC+3d is a critical test: EventRisk score should jump to 8+ within 72h window.
If score comes out < -8, check correlation amplifier implementation (should be × 1.5).
